turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I wanted to check if your clinic accepts Star Health Insurance. My policy is a family floater.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good afternoon! Yes, we are empanelled with Star Health Insurance. We accept cashless claims for most of their plans including family floater policies.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh great. And what documents do I need to carry for the cashless process?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You'll need your Star Health insurance card, a valid photo ID like Aadhaar or PAN, and the pre-authorization letter if your treatment is planned. For OPD consultations, just the card and ID are sufficient.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Okay, and is there any specific counter at the clinic for TPA submissions?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, there's a dedicated TPA desk on the ground floor near the billing section. It operates from 9 AM to 6 PM on weekdays and 9 AM to 1 PM on Saturdays.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect. That answers everything, thank you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Happy to help! See you soon at Sunrise Clinic.
